cases.title: Testing-plan §6.2 browser matrix and §4.1 localization gate cover NFR-14 student check-in UX scenarios
preconditions: Testing-plan §6.2 browser matrix (iOS Safari, Android Chrome, Chromium mobile emulation) and release readiness §4.1 localized rejection reason gate apply.
Fixture matrix seeds open session, enrolled student, gps-required session, expired token, and prior-success duplicate state.
NFR-14 requires concise Vietnamese guidance for expired QR, login required, GPS denied, out-of-radius, and duplicate attempts per 07-non-functional-risk §2.5.
steps: Map each NFR-14 failure scenario to testing-plan §3 student validation row (AC-06 to AC-10) and 12-ui-states §5.1 outcome catalog.
For ExpiredQr, Unauthenticated, GpsDisabled, OutOfRadius, and DuplicateCheckIn, verify integration harness can drive API outcome and resolve expected vi-VN copy key.
Confirm mobile-web viewport profile (375px width) is the default harness context for student PG-02 flows.
Record pass/fail per scenario against NFR-14 mobile-first UX and localization requirements.
cases.expected: All five NFR-14 mandated failure scenarios are represented in the verification matrix with mapped outcome codes, Vietnamese copy intent from 12-ui-states §5.1, and mobile browser targets per testing-plan §6.2; release readiness §4.1 localized student-facing errors gate is satisfiable.

cases.title: Check-in outcome i18n mapper resolves API error codes to Vietnamese copy at module boundary
preconditions: Integration environment loads vi-VN locale bundle for student-facing check-in messages per 08-forms-validation-ux.md §5.
Error mapper module maps API §3.2 outcome codes to 12-ui-states §5.1 page state IDs and copy templates.
Real database persists CheckInAttempt rows for failed outcomes used in mapping verification.
steps: Drive check-in service to persist failed attempts with outcomes ExpiredQr, GpsDisabled, OutOfRadius, DuplicateCheckIn, and NotEnrolled.
Invoke i18n/error-mapper module for each outcome code with locale vi-VN.
Assert returned message matches authoritative copy intent (e.g. 'Mã QR đã hết hạn', 'Cần quyền vị trí', 'Ngoài phạm vi lớp', 'Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi.').
Verify mapper also returns correct page state ID (failure-expired-qr, failure-gps-denied, failure-out-of-radius, failure-duplicate) and retry-allowed flag per 12-ui-states §5.1.
cases.expected: Module boundary consistently maps each NFR-14 failure outcome to concise Vietnamese student copy and correct UI state metadata without requiring UI layer for resolution; persisted CheckInAttempt outcome codes align with mapper inputs per FR-22 and BR-23.

cases.title: Auth gate module preserves check-in deep-link return URL through login redirect chain
preconditions: Integration auth module enforces FR-15 login gate with returnUrl preservation per FLOW-01 step 2.
Unauthenticated request targets PG-02 /check-in?token={validToken} for an open session.
vi-VN locale bundle includes Unauthenticated copy 'Đăng nhập để tiếp tục' per 12-ui-states §5.1.
steps: Invoke auth middleware for unauthenticated GET /check-in?token={validToken}.
Assert redirect target is /login with encoded returnUrl containing original token query parameter.
Simulate successful POST /v1/auth/login and verify redirect returns to /check-in?token={validToken} unchanged.
Resolve localized login-required message for authenticating state.
cases.expected: Auth gate module preserves deep-link token through login redirect chain; localized Vietnamese login-required guidance is available for the authenticating state per NFR-14 login-required scenario and AC-06.

cases.title: HTTP contract POST /v1/check-ins returns 422 ExpiredQr envelope driving failure-expired-qr UI
preconditions: Open class session exists; enrolled student is authenticated.
Expired qrToken is supplied on check-in submission.
E2E harness validates standard { data, meta, error } response envelope per API §2.3.
steps: Send POST /v1/check-ins with expired qrToken, clientTimestamp, Idempotency-Key, and student Authorization header.
Validate HTTP 422 status and error.code ExpiredQr.
Inspect error.message or localized message field for Vietnamese expired-QR guidance intent.
Verify data is null and no successful attendance outcome is returned.
cases.expected: API returns HTTP 422 with error.code ExpiredQr and student-facing Vietnamese message intent ('Mã QR đã hết hạn. Vui lòng quét mã mới.' per 08-forms-validation-ux.md §5); response envelope is consumable by mobile PG-02 CheckInResultScreen failure-expired-qr state per NFR-14.

cases.title: HTTP contract unauthenticated POST /v1/check-ins returns 401 login-required envelope
preconditions: Open class session with valid qrToken exists.
No Authorization header is supplied on check-in request.
Auth contract per API §6.1 pipeline step 1 applies.
steps: Send POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and required body fields but without Bearer token.
Validate HTTP 401 status and error.code Unauthenticated.
Inspect error message for Vietnamese login-required copy intent ('Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục.').
Verify no CheckInAttempt success or attendance mutation occurs.
cases.expected: Unauthenticated check-in returns HTTP 401 with standard envelope and Unauthenticated error code; message supports NFR-14 login-required UX and AC-06 gate without disclosing attendance data.

cases.title: FLOW-01 mobile-web primary check-in journey uses single-column PG-02 layout to success-present
preconditions: Student actor uses mobile-web profile per testing-plan §6.2.
Open session with valid rotating QR; student is enrolled and not yet checked in.
FLOW-01 steps 1–6 apply with GPS policy satisfied or not required.
steps: Student opens /check-in?token={validToken} on mobile viewport (375px width).
Complete login redirect if unauthenticated; grant GPS if policy requires.
Submit check-in and await terminal outcome.
Verify CheckInResultScreen renders success-present or success-late with Vietnamese status copy and timestamp.
Confirm PG-02 uses full-width single-column layout with readable mobile typography per 11-wireframes §LAY-01.
cases.expected: Primary FLOW-01 mobile-web journey completes on PG-02 with mobile-first single-column layout, decisive Vietnamese success copy, and CheckInResultScreen outcome per NFR-14 and AC-11 without desktop-only affordances.

cases.title: FLOW-02 rejection branches surface concise Vietnamese guidance and recoverable next actions
preconditions: Mobile-web E2E harness can drive each FLOW-02 rejection branch per 10-user-flows §2.2.
Fixtures exist for ExpiredQr, GpsDisabled, OutOfRadius, DuplicateCheckIn, and Unauthenticated paths.
12-ui-states §5.1 defines alert variant and retry-allowed flag per outcome.
steps: ExpiredQr branch: submit expired token; verify danger alert with retry CTA and Vietnamese rescan guidance.
GpsDisabled branch: deny GPS on gps-required session; verify warning alert with enable-location guidance.
OutOfRadius branch: submit out-of-radius coordinates; verify warning alert with move-closer or manual-fallback guidance.
DuplicateCheckIn branch: resubmit after success; verify info alert without retry CTA and existing status display.
Unauthenticated branch: open check-in without session; verify redirect to PG-01 with return URL preservation.
cases.expected: Each FLOW-02 rejection branch renders concise Vietnamese copy and correct recovery affordance (retry CTA, redirect login, or no-retry info) per NFR-14 mandated scenarios and 12-ui-states §5.1; no ambiguous intermediate states on PG-02.

cases.title: Narrow mobile viewport 320px preserves readable Vietnamese error copy without horizontal overflow
preconditions: Student check-in PG-02 is rendered at minimum supported mobile width (320px) per C-02 device variance constraint.
Expired qrToken triggers ExpiredQr failure path.
Harness can measure layout overflow and text truncation.
steps: Set viewport to 320px width mobile profile.
Navigate to /check-in?token={expired} and submit check-in.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure-expired-qr alert at narrow width.
Measure for horizontal scroll, clipped text, or unreadable truncated Vietnamese message.
Repeat with DuplicateCheckIn info alert at 320px width.
cases.expected: At 320px mobile boundary, Vietnamese error guidance remains fully readable without horizontal overflow or clipped copy; alert and CTA controls remain usable per NFR-14 mobile-first resilience under device variance (C-02).

cases.title: Mobile PG-02 ExpiredQr journey shows Vietnamese rescan guidance with retry CTA
preconditions: Student is on mobile-web viewport (Chromium mobile emulation, 375px) at PG-02 /check-in.
Open session exists; deep link supplies expired qrToken query parameter.
Lecturer QR display is refreshing on PG-05 for recovery context.
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token={expired} as enrolled student.
Submit check-in from mobile check-in form.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure-expired-qr danger alert with Vietnamese copy (e.g. 'Mã QR đã hết hạn').
Verify retry/rescan CTA is visible and actionable on mobile touch target.
Rescan with fresh valid token and confirm success path is reachable.
cases.expected: Mobile browser renders ExpiredQr failure with concise Vietnamese rescan guidance and recoverable retry CTA per NFR-14 and 12-ui-states §5.1; student can recover without desktop-only controls.

cases.title: Unauthenticated mobile check-in redirects to PG-01 login with Vietnamese guidance and return URL
preconditions: Student has no active session cookie on mobile-web viewport.
Valid check-in deep link /check-in?token={validToken} targets an open session.
PG-01 login page is reachable.
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token={validToken} without authentication.
Observe redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving token query parameter.
Verify login page or interim state shows Vietnamese login-required messaging ('Đăng nhập để tiếp tục' or 'Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục.').
Complete login with valid student credentials.
Confirm browser returns to /check-in?token={validToken} and check-in form is ready.
cases.expected: Mobile login-required flow preserves deep-link token, surfaces concise Vietnamese authentication guidance, and returns student to PG-02 after successful login per NFR-14 and AC-06.

cases.title: Mobile PG-02 GpsDisabled journey shows Vietnamese location-permission guidance
preconditions: gps-required-session fixture is active with open session.
Student is logged in on mobile-web viewport at PG-02.
Browser geolocation permission is denied or blocked for the origin.
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token={validToken} for gps-required session.
Deny or block GPS permission when GpsPermissionPrompt appears.
Submit check-in attempt.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure-gps-denied warning alert with Vietnamese copy (e.g. 'Cần quyền vị trí').
Verify recovery guidance explains enabling location or contacting lecturer for manual fallback per FLOW-03 step 5.
cases.expected: GPS-denied mobile journey renders concise Vietnamese location-permission guidance with recoverable next action per NFR-14; no false success state; manual fallback path is referenced per AC-09.

cases.title: Mobile PG-02 OutOfRadius journey shows Vietnamese out-of-radius guidance
preconditions: gps-required-session fixture has room coordinates and configured radius.
Student is logged in on mobile-web viewport with GPS permission granted.
Harness can supply coordinates outside configured radius.
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token={validToken} on mobile viewport.
Grant GPS permission and supply out-of-radius coordinates via harness geolocation mock.
Submit check-in.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure-out-of-radius warning alert with Vietnamese copy (e.g. 'Ngoài phạm vi lớp').
Verify recovery guidance suggests moving closer or lecturer manual fallback without retry spam.
cases.expected: Out-of-radius mobile failure surfaces concise Vietnamese guidance with appropriate warning styling and recovery steps per NFR-14 and AC-10; student understands next action without desktop-only affordances.

cases.title: Mobile PG-02 DuplicateCheckIn journey shows Vietnamese info alert without retry CTA
preconditions: Student is logged in on mobile-web viewport.
Student has already completed successful check-in (Present or Late) for the target open session.
Fresh valid qrToken is available via deep link for second submission.
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token={validToken} for already-checked-in session.
Submit check-in from mobile form.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure-duplicate info alert with Vietnamese copy (e.g. 'Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi.').
Verify no retry/submit CTA is shown.
Confirm existing success status and timestamp are displayed on result screen.
cases.expected: Duplicate attempt mobile UI renders info alert with concise Vietnamese duplicate guidance, no retry CTA, and visible prior success status per NFR-14 and FLOW-02 DuplicateCheckIn branch.

cases.title: Mobile PG-02 check-in controls meet 44px minimum touch targets on 375px viewport
preconditions: Student is on mobile-web viewport width 375px at PG-02 check-in page.
Open session with valid token; student is authenticated.
Accessibility checklist CHK-A11Y-05 and 13-accessibility-basics.md touch target rules apply.
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token={validToken} on 375px mobile viewport.
Measure bounding box height and width of primary submit CTA and any visible retry/recovery buttons.
If GpsPermissionPrompt is shown, measure allow/deny action touch targets.
Verify single-column full-width CTA layout per 11-wireframes §LAY-01.
Confirm no controls require pinch-zoom or horizontal scroll to activate.
cases.expected: Primary student check-in CTAs and recovery actions meet 44px minimum touch target on 375px viewport per NFR-UI-11; mobile-first layout uses full-width controls suitable for classroom check-in pressure per NFR-14.

cases.title: Physical iOS Safari and Android Chrome pilot verify NFR-14 mobile check-in UX on campus devices
preconditions: Staging pilot uses real iOS Safari and Android Chrome per testing-plan §6.2 browser matrix.
Open session with valid QR; enrolled student physical devices available on campus network.
Physical device matrix and native browser permission dialogs are not reproducible in Playwright MCP harness.
steps: Student scans classroom QR on iOS Safari; complete login, GPS, and check-in or failure recovery flow.
Repeat on Android Chrome with at least one NFR-14 failure scenario (expired QR or GPS denied).
Verify Vietnamese copy renders correctly on physical device screens without layout breakage.
Confirm touch interactions work without mis-taps on primary CTAs.
cases.expected: Physical mobile browsers deliver NFR-14 mobile-first check-in UX with readable Vietnamese guidance on real devices; provides production-like evidence beyond Chromium emulation.
